extract: Tyranitar (Japanese: バンギラス Bangiras) is a dual-type Rock/Dark Pokémon introduced in Generation II. It evolves from Pupitar starting at level 55. It is the final form of Larvitar. Tyranitar can Mega Evolve into Mega Tyranitar using the Tyranitarite. It is referred to as a pseudo-legendary Pokémon by fans. The Paradox Pokémon Iron Thorns is said to be either a future relative of Tyranitar or a version of it from a parallel timeline.
